title: Do you speak English?
question: 把今天课文里“猜错语言、沉默、最后一句话解开误会”的线索放进机场、酒店、学校活动或线上游戏——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: I thought the tourist could only speak French. So I said hello in French. Later, he asked me, "Do you speak English?"

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 机场问路：我以为那位旅客只会说法语，后来他用英语问我
options.english_template: I thought the traveller could only speak French. Later, he asked me, "___"

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 酒店前台：我用同一种语言回答，于是对方误会我真的会那种语言
options.english_template: I said good morning in French, and the clerk ___ in the same language.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 线上游戏：我们都以为对方听不懂，于是两个人都没开口
options.english_template: We both guessed the wrong language, so ___ spoke for a minute.
